title: Working Like a Lawyer with Claude
summary: Mark Pike (Anthropic Legal Counsel) and Anna Gressel (Freshfields Partner, Global Co-Head of AI) discuss how lawyers use Claude in legal work. They examine shifts in legal practice enabled by AI while emphasizing that final judgement and decision-making remain with human lawyers.
